annotation.technical_notes: A highly minimalist, almost completely dark preset where the screen remains a black void. A tiny central custom wave or shape flickers and shifts color in response to high-frequency transients in the synthetic test signal. With zoom and warp parameters set to zero, no feedback or motion fields are visible, leaving only this micro-scale central activity.
